expectations.text: Checks current Norwegian mortgage rates via web search
expectations.evidence: Analysis notes: 'No live web search was performed. For execution, verify current rates.' Used ~4-5% estimates.

expectations.text: Applies Norwegian lending rules: 5x income cap, 15% equity requirement, stress test at current rate +3%
expectations.evidence: Detailed table: 'Max loan-to-value: 85%', 'Max debt-to-income: 5x gross household income', 'Stress test: Afford payments at current rate + 3pp.'

expectations.text: Identifies that 1.5M single income means max 7.5M loan — flags need for dual income or more equity
expectations.evidence: 'Max loan: 1,500,000 * 5 = 7,500,000 NOK... You cannot finance this on single income alone. The 5x rule is the binding constraint.'

expectations.text: Considers tax implications of selling shares from ASK (only taxed on withdrawal above deposits)
expectations.evidence: 'ASK: tax only on withdrawal above total deposits. If cost basis ~1.2M, value 1.5M, tax on 300K gain = ~113,500 NOK (37.84%).'

expectations.text: Presents both bull and bear case for the purchase
expectations.evidence: Full 'Adversarial Research' table with 6 factors and bull/bear columns. (Note: baseline adopted the same structure as the skill output format, suggesting the prompt context was sufficient.)

expectations.text: Models at least 2 financing scenarios with different equity/loan mixes
expectations.evidence: Scenario A (max loan, minimize equity) and Scenario B (larger equity, smaller loan) with detailed calculations.

expectations.text: All key amounts presented in NOK and after-tax
expectations.evidence: Consistent NOK amounts. After-tax considerations for ASK withdrawal and formuesskatt.

expectations.text: Includes Financial Freedom Impact section showing how purchase affects FI number and timeline
expectations.evidence: Has 'Financial Freedom Impact' section with level estimate, FI progress statement, and 'delays FI by approximately 3-7 years.'

expectations.text: Recommends consulting revisor or advokat before executing
expectations.evidence: Next Actions #7: 'Consult revisor/advokat before executing.' Also closing disclaimer.
